creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Catch the world-famous #CirqueDuSoleilOvo at @cocacolaarena in Dubai from January 12 to 18, 2023!

🐞This family-friendly show takes us to the whimsical world of insects!

🤸‍♀️Dazzling performances in a dreamy magical stage, it’s a unique production that you really shouldn’t miss! 

Tag your family and friends!
